stemHtml: An aircraft receives a TCAS RA and executes the evasion manoeuvre. The TCAS then gives a 'Clear of Conflict' message but before the pilot can transmit to ATC, another aircraft reports an urgency. What should the pilot do?

options.a: Remain at the new altitude and fly a holding pattern until the urgent transmission has ended, then advise ATC and request a new FL.
options.b: Return to the previous altitude and wait until the urgency has ended, then report TCAS RA to ATC when time allows.
options.c: Remain at the new altitude until the urgent transmission has ended, then advise ATC and request a new FL.
options.d: Return to the previous flight level and interrupt the urgency transmission to report the TCAS advisory.
